ABC001SP12345.name: Sunrise Digestive Biscuits
ABC001SP12345.ingredients: Whole wheat flour (52%), sugar, edible vegetable oil (palm), invert syrup, raising agents (E500, E503), iodised salt, emulsifier (E322 – soy lecithin), malt extract, artificial flavouring (vanilla).

DEF002XP54321.name: Crispy Wheat Chips — Masala
DEF002XP54321.ingredients: Wheat flour, edible vegetable oil (sunflower), corn starch, seasoning (spices, salt, sugar, citric acid E330, onion powder, garlic powder), acidity regulator (E296).

GHI003QP67890.name: Golden Farms Milk Toffees
GHI003QP67890.ingredients: Sugar, skimmed milk powder, edible vegetable fat (palm), lactose, glucose syrup, emulsifier (E442, E476), salt, artificial flavour (milk, cardamom).
